title: Closing Price: Zone 1 / Phase 1 Canonical Workflow Repository
description: Metadata-only, schema-validated, human-gated pre-production and prompt governance pipeline for Zone 1 / Phase 1 of the Closing Price AI-assisted film project. Includes scene cards, character and location records, continuity files, prompt lifecycle infrastructure, JSON schema validation (20+ schemas, draft 2020-12), a Human-Agent Production Copilot layer (HA-0 to HA-6) enabling structured multi-agent coordination without external APIs, and a Streamlit dashboard for operator oversight. All production decisions are reproducible and academically defensible; generated media outputs are stored externally and referenced by metadata-only records. Release v0.1.0 marks completion of the Human-Agent Production Copilot layer and scientific clean packaging.
